description:
We believe in playing a part in helping productive communication around specific topics. Change often starts with effective campaigns that raise awareness around issues. To help organizations working on such campaigns, we make available free email and landing page templates that can be used to create digital assets for them. 

All Beefree templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, HubSpot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: I have a degree in graphic design and I am dedicated to the world of communication providing graphic solutions to companies to get the best out of them. I consider myself a detail-oriented, demanding and multidisciplinary person, passionate about the world of communication. I believe in design as a powerful tool to communicate values, ideas and emotions, this is what I try to transfer in any project to always get the best result.
